bird.name: Harris's sparrow
bird.summary: Harris's sparrow (Zonotrichia querula) is a large sparrow. Their breeding habitat is the north part of central Canada (primarily the Northw…

locations.name: 温带针叶林
locations.summary: 温带针叶林是世界自然基金会定义的一种生態區，即一片長有針葉樹或闊葉樹的樹林。温带针叶林主要分布在夏暖冬凉以及冬季温和、降雨量大的沿海地区，或气候较干燥的内陆或山地地区。此外，一种独立的栖息地类型，热带针叶林，则更多的存在于热带气候中。 不…

relations.subject: Harris's sparrow
relations.evidence: Harris's sparrow breeds in stunted coniferous forests and adjacent scrubs, especially areas of the grand boreal forests where stands of spruce abut mossy bogs
